name: aframe-presenter-component
description: present an A-Frame scene to a group using the Multisync network

scripts.assemble-model: mkdir -p dist; cp -pr index.html src data-presenter model-presenter assets favicon.ico dist/
scripts.assemble-graph: mkdir -p dist-graph; cp -pr src node-graph-presenter assets favicon.ico dist-graph/ && sed -e 's|\.\./||g' node-graph-presenter/index.html > dist-graph/index.html
scripts.presurge-graph: npm run build && npm run assemble-graph
scripts.old: rsync -rtm --delete index.html src data-presenter node-graph-presenter model-presenter assets root@mail.hominidsoftware.com:/var/www/beta/
scripts.preprod-graph: npm run build && npm run assemble-graph
scripts.pres3: npm run build && npm run assemble-model

author: Doug Reeder
